w:r.w:t: {% block title %}Model Prediction - My Portal{% endblock %}

<ul class="tabs" style="display: flex; gap: 20px; list-style: none; padding: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc;">

<label> (Parquet File : Please mind, Only Features, UserID and Label Column required.) </label>

placeholder="AgreementNo, ReferenceNumber, AGREEMENTNO (Mind small and capital case)" required>
<!-- Two sequential buttons for decoupled actions for metrics and statistical tests. -->
placeholder="AgreementNo, ReferenceNumber, AGREEMENTNO (Mind small and capital case)" required>
/* Unifying the same stylre for tyhe use of buttons */
function toggleParquetInput(isUploadSelected) { // Using 2 spaces for function body
if (isUploadSelected) { // Using 2 spaces for if/else blocks
function toggleModelInput(isUploadSelected) { // Using 2 spaces for function body
const uploadContainer = document.getElementById('upload_model_container'); // Using 2 spaces for statements
if (isUploadSelected) { // Using 2 spaces for if/else blocks
//Initialisation of functions in the window.onload function
toggleParquetInput(false); // Default to using default file for parquet
toggleParquetInput(false); // Ensure correct state on load
toggleParquetInput(true); // Ensure correct state on load
<!-- Individual page templates will populate this -->
/* This is going to make sure the theme will be changed based on the root file itself. The container had been hardcoded for model compare page */
Upload File
Use Default File
<label>User ID Column Name: <small>(Make sure both files have same column name)</small></label>
Z-Test (Proportions of positive cases within a specific group)
T-Test (Means of the predicted probabilities)
F-Test (Equality of variances of the predicted probabilities)
KS-Test (Equality of distributions of predicted probabilities)
DeLong/Bootstrap AUC Test (Equality of AUCs)
McNemar Test (Equality of discordant pairs in classification outcomes)
{% if m.champ is string %}{{ m.champ }}{% else %}{{ m.champ|floatformat:4 }}{% endif %}
{% if m.challenger is string %}{{ m.challenger }}{% else %}{{ m.challenger|floatformat:4 }}{% endif %}
{% if s.p_value < 0.05 %} Reject Null Hypothesis {% else %} Status Quo Maintained {% endif %}
{% if s.p_value < 0.05 %} Challenger is significantly better {% else %} No significant difference in performance {% endif %}
